description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a metallic finish and a robust wooden stock, giving it a classic appearance. Mounted atop the receiver is a large, cylindrical scope with adjustment knobs and a flip-up lens cover, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting at distance. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly visible, and the rifle appears to have a bolt-action mechanism. The wooden stock is ergonomically shaped, with a smooth, polished surface and a reddish-brown hue. The scope is finished in a matte olive green, contrasting with the metallic barrel and the wood. No external magazine is visible, and the muzzle is plain, lacking any additional device.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a long metallic barrel, wooden stock, and a large mounted scope with flip-up cover.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, metallic barrel, and the mounted scope with its flip-up cover raised.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular scope lens and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, wooden stock, and metallic barrel, with the scope's flip-up cover visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the scope's eyepiece and the end of the wooden stock, showing the rifle's alignment.
